name: Colour Contrast Analyser
description: Colour Contrast Analyser — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Colour Contrast Analyser — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Colour Contrast Analyser: Colour Contrast Analyser — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Eyedropper contrast ratio check for text on brand background
WCAG AA vs AAA threshold verification for design tokens
Desktop audit of contrast in screenshot mockups offline
Color palette validation before design system token commit
Form label contrast checked against WCAG 1.4.3 criterion

pros: Free desktop tool from TPGi, widely trusted
Instant WCAG ratio checks with eyedropper
Works offline without sending data anywhere
cons: Single-purpose tool, not a full a11y suite
Manual workflow, no automation or CI
No reporting across pages or components
Dated UI compared to modern design tools
review.verdict: Essential free utility for checking contrast pair by pair, but it's a utility, not a monitoring platform.
review.best_for: Designers and a11y specialists validating specific color pairs against WCAG.
review.not_for: Teams needing automated contrast checks across live sites.
